subject: [PATCH v3 3/3] fuse: publish io-uring queues with release semantics

2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch fixes a potential race condition in the io-uring implementation of the FUSE file system by ensuring that the initialization of fuse_ring_queue structures is properly ordered before their publication. It achieves this by replacing WRITE_ONCE() with smp_store_release() to guarantee that the queue's field initialization happens before its pointer assignment. Additionally, it uses READ_ONCE() for readers accessing the queues to prevent undefined behavior in case of concurrent access.
